---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or quest for the mod."
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []

---

**Feature Description**
Do you have an idea for a new quest, reward, or GUI change? Describe it here clearly.

**Why is this needed?**
Explain how this feature would improve the gameplay experience for players or server owners.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
